title: Rename device - the app in/out the background
scenario: Device name change does not persist after app is backgrounded and foregrounded in Device Settings
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the device name to enter Device Settings.
Tap on the device name field and rename the device (e.g., change to "My Poly Device").
Confirm or save the new name.
Press the Home button or swipe up to send the app to the background.
Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app by tapping its icon or bringing it back to the foreground.
Navigate back to Device Settings and observe the device name.
expected: The renamed device name (e.g., "My Poly Device") persists and is displayed correctly in Device Settings after the app is brought back to the foreground.
